# 👋 Welcome to My AI Projects!

I'm a full-stack developer passionate about building intelligent applications that solve real-world problems. Here's what I'm currently working on:

---

## 🚀 Featured Project: AI Document Analysis Platform

### 🤖 AI-Powered Document Analysis Web Application

A sophisticated full-stack web application that leverages **Hugging Face pre-trained models** to intelligently extract and analyze documents. Upload PDFs, Word documents, or images to get structured insights including document type, key fields, summary, and tabular data.

**Built for:** GUVI x HCL Hackathon

### 🌐 Live Demo
- **🎯 Frontend:** [document-ai-frontend.onrender.com](https://document-ai-frontend.onrender.com)
- **⚙️ Backend API:** [document-ai-backend.onrender.com](https://document-ai-backend.onrender.com)
- **📚 API Documentation:** [API Docs](https://document-ai-backend.onrender.com/docs)

---

## ✨ Key Features

### 📄 Multi-Format Support
- PDF files (text-based & scanned)
- Word documents (.docx)
- Images (JPG, PNG, BMP, GIF)

### 🧠 AI-Powered Intelligence
- **Document Type Detection** — Automatically identifies document category
- **Key Field Extraction** — Intelligently extracts important information
- **Summarization** — Generates concise document summaries
- **Table Recognition** — Detects and extracts tabular data
- **Structured Output** — Returns JSON for easy integration

### 💻 User Experience
- **Drag & Drop Upload** — Intuitive file upload interface
- **Real-time Feedback** — Loading states and progress indicators
- **Beautiful UI** — Modern, responsive design
- **Export Results** — Download analysis as JSON
- **File Metadata** — Complete file information display

### ⚡ Performance
- **FastAPI Backend** — High-performance async server
- **CORS Enabled** — Secure cross-origin requests
- **Large File Support** — Handle files up to 50MB
- **Error Handling** — Graceful failure with helpful messages

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

### 🎨 Frontend
```
React 18 | React Dropzone | Axios | CSS3 | Responsive Design
```

### ⚙️ Backend
```
Python 3.8+ | FastAPI | Hugging Face | PyMuPDF | PyTorch
```

### 🤖 AI/ML
```
Hugging Face Transformers | Pre-trained NLP Models | PyTorch
```

### 🚀 DevOps
```
Docker | Render | GitHub Actions | Gunicorn
```

---

## 📊 AI Tools & Models

### **Hugging Face Transformers**
- State-of-the-art pre-trained transformer models
- Multi-task NLP capabilities
- Free and open-source ecosystem
- GPU/CPU optimized inference
- Extensive model library for document understanding

### **Model Pipeline**
1. **Text Extraction** — PyMuPDF, pdfplumber, python-docx
2. **Preprocessing** — Text cleaning and tokenization
3. **Analysis** — Hugging Face transformer models
4. **Structuring** — JSON output generation
5. **Delivery** — REST API response

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Prerequisites
- Python 3.8+
- Node.js 14+
- Hugging Face API access (free tier available)

### Clone & Setup
```bash
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/document-ai.git
cd document-ai

# Backend Setup
cd backend
python -m venv venv
venv\Scripts\activate  # Windows
source venv/bin/activate  # macOS/Linux
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Frontend Setup (in new terminal)
cd frontend
npm install

# Start Backend
python main.py  # Port 8000

# Start Frontend (in new terminal)
npm start  # Port 3000
```

Visit **http://localhost:3000** to start analyzing documents!

## 🎯 Use Cases

### 📋 Invoice Processing
Extract vendor info, invoice numbers, dates, amounts, and tax details automatically.

### 📄 Resume Parsing
Identify candidate information, education, work experience, and skills instantly.

### 📑 Contract Analysis
Extract parties, dates, terms, and key obligations from legal documents.

### 🧾 Receipt & Expense Tracking
Process receipts and expense reports for financial management.

### 📰 Document Classification
Automatically categorize and organize documents by type.
